summary: P0 shell-wire QA: 9/9 DSG TV endpoint tests pass; 570/570 regression_shield pass; frontend Playwright sweep validates CmdK launcher, /dsg-tv 3-tab page, /explore registry, and mobile bottom nav with 6 tabs. One minor UX issue on Predict-to-Win create form (list does not visibly refresh within 2.5s).

integration_issues.issue: After clicking Create with a fresh prompt, the open-pools list on the page did not visibly include the new pool prompt within 2.5s. Backend POST /api/dsg-tv/predict/create returns ok:true and the pool DOES show up in /api/dsg-tv/predict/open (verified by backend test). Likely missing refetch/refresh of the predict list on create success, OR the prompt is rendered truncated in the list card. Non-blocking but should be confirmed by main agent.

action_items: (optional) Verify that the Predict-to-Win list on /dsg-tv re-fetches /api/dsg-tv/predict/open after a successful create. If the list already does, ensure the rendered card shows the prompt text (currently the prompt may be truncated/styled in a way that the body innerText check missed it).

Cosmetic only: consider exposing `data-testid='dsg-tv-tab-prestige|stools|predict'` on each of the 3 tab buttons (currently selectable by text but stable testids would future-proof regression scripts).
critical_code_review_comments: services/dsg_tv_expansion.py:resolve_pool — when there are NO winners, winners_pool flows to Treasury (zero-burn rule preserved). Comment & logic are consistent with the founder rule of 0% in-app burn. ✅

resolve_pool integer-division on payouts (int(winners_pool * coins/winning_total)) may leave 1-2 coins of rounding dust unallocated; non-blocking but worth a treasury sweep at end of resolve to keep books exact.
routes/dsg_tv_expansion_routes.py imports look clean; admin endpoints correctly guarded by require_admin.
Constants endpoint exposes burn_pct:0.0 explicitly — good contract for frontend to display '0% in-app burn' badge.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (CmdK PASS, tabs PASS, mobile nav PASS, /explore PASS, predict create has UI refresh concern)

test_credentials: betatester1@globalvibez.com / BetaTester2026! (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Demo accounts also documented for betatester2/3.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 TEST_ prediction pool via backend test (prompt='TEST_pool_will_x_win_match?'). Pool persists in prediction_pools collection in 'open' status. Safe to ignore or sweep.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 shell-wire is GREEN. New endpoint test file: /app/backend/tests/test_dsg_tv_expansion_shell_wire.py — reuse for any DSG TV regression. Regression shield (570 tests) covers full platform — run via `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/regression_shield.py -q`. CmdK launcher uses data-testid='cmdk-launcher'; mobile bottom nav uses data-testid='mobile-bottom-nav'; DSG TV page uses data-testid='dsg-tv-page' + 'dsg-tv-tabs'. EXPLORE_REGISTRY in /app/frontend/src/pages/Explore.tsx shows 57 surfaces — confirmed live.
rca_of_the_issue: Minor UX: After Predict-to-Win create, the list refresh on the DSG TV Predict tab was not detected via DOM text scan within 2.5s. Backend (POST /api/dsg-tv/predict/create) is confirmed to insert the pool and GET /api/dsg-tv/predict/open returns it. So this is a pure client-side concern — either the React fetch is not re-triggered after the create promise resolves, or the rendered card displays a truncated/styled prompt that didn't textually match. Recommended quick fix: in DSGTVExpansion.tsx Predict-tab create handler, await the create and then call the same loader used on mount (e.g. setPools(await fetch('/api/dsg-tv/predict/open'))). Add a `toast.success('Pool created')` for clarity.
